form.formComment: Back from a three-and-a-half months spell and last resumed over 365m at this track where he was in the placings, finishing second. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start came together.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last in a Grade 5 on March 30 over 365m at this track behind Cumbria Rich beaten 5 lengths (21.57). Has clocked an excellent 20.56 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.
